subcodes.first_line: O perfumed pilgrim! Praise be to God that from those regions thou didst don the pilgrim's robe for the Ka'bah of thy heart's desire with utmost sincerity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین مشام الحمد لله از آنسامان احرام کعبه مقصود بستی و در نهایت خلوص
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
